summary: Core shared helpers were split into protocol, IO, goal-state, dossier rendering, and dossier persistence modules while preserving shared.ts as a compatibility barrel.
fit: The TypeScript agent-state CLI baseline keeps deterministic .opennori state writes in core modules and separates protocol constants, filesystem IO, goal state discovery, and generated review surfaces.
implementation_focus: Reduce src/core/shared.ts responsibility without changing CLI behavior, Product AC semantics, or subjective validators.
evidence: npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false; npm run test:quick; npm run check; opennori doctor/status all passed.
limitations: This slice only splits existing deterministic helpers. It does not yet refactor CLI runtime command boundaries or dashboard projection modules.
next: Use this apply record as architecture context when recording Product AC evidence.
